_comment: Hot-function map for the PPCG backend, keyed by source basename. Values are the function(s) whose bodies get #pragma scop markers (Phase 0's per-program hot-kernel calls, SCOP_CLASSIFICATION.md). ppcg_to_cu.py consults this when --fn is not given; absent entries fall back to pet autodetect. Only entries verified to produce a compilable .cu belong here.
